parameters.jsCode:
const startDate = new Date('2026-04-22');
const today = new Date();
const dayNumber = Math.floor((today - startDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) + 1;
const dayOfWeek = ((dayNumber - 1) % 7) + 1;

const posts = {
  1: {
    platform: 'HackerNews',
    title: 'Show HN: ProofKit – Social proof notifications for $9/mo',
    postUrl: 'https://news.ycombinator.com/submit',
    copyPaste: `Proof.com charges $29/mo for a popup that says "someone just purchased."
The technology is trivial. The pricing isn't.

So I built the same thing for $9/mo, plus testimonial collection built in.

• One-line JavaScript embed
• Animated social proof notifications
• Testimonial collection via shareable link
• Public testimonial wall
• Free tier (5 testimonials, no card required)

Why $9/mo? Because small businesses shouldn't pay enterprise prices for a popup widget.

Try it: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Would love feedback — what would make you actually use this?`
  },
  2: {
    platform: 'Product Hunt',
    title: 'Launch on Product Hunt',
    postUrl: 'https://www.producthunt.com/posts/new',
    copyPaste: `Hey PH! 👋

I was frustrated paying $29/mo for Proof.com to show "someone just bought" popups.

So I built ProofKit:
• Same social proof notifications
• Testimonial collection built in
• $9/mo instead of $29

Try it: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/`
  },
  3: {
    platform: 'Reddit r/SaaS',
    title: 'I built a Proof.com alternative for $9/mo',
    postUrl: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/SaaS/submit',
    copyPaste: `Proof.com makes $250K/mo showing "someone just purchased" popups.
I built the same thing + testimonial collection for $9/mo.

Free tier: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Is $9/mo too cheap? Too crowded a market? Roast away.`
  },
  4: {
    platform: 'Reddit r/Entrepreneur',
    title: 'The $9 social proof tool replacing Proof.com + Senja',
    postUrl: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/Entrepreneur/submit',
    copyPaste: `Every landing page needs social proof. Existing tools charge $25-29/mo.

I built ProofKit — social proof + testimonials in one tool for $9/mo.

1. "Sarah just purchased" notifications
2. Testimonial collection via shareable link
3. Public testimonial wall
4. One-line embed

Free tier included: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/`
  },
  5: {
    platform: 'Reddit r/webdev',
    title: 'Open-sourced: social proof widget in React',
    postUrl: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/webdev/submit',
    copyPaste: `Built a social proof + testimonial widget in React. Deploys to GitHub Pages for free.

Tech: React 19 + Vite + localStorage

Source: https://github.com/factspark23-hash/proofkit
Live: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/`
  },
  6: {
    platform: 'Twitter/X',
    title: 'Post thread about ProofKit',
    postUrl: 'https://twitter.com/compose/tweet',
    copyPaste: `Tweet 1:
Proof.com makes $250K/mo showing "someone just bought" popups.
The technology is trivial. The pricing isn't.
So I built the same thing for $9/mo. 👇

Tweet 2:
One line of code. Animated notifications. Custom branding.
Plus: testimonial collection built in. Proof.com charges extra for that.

Tweet 3:
Why $9/mo?
Small businesses can't justify $29/mo for a popup widget.
I'd rather have 1,000 happy customers at $9 than 100 at $29.

Tweet 4:
Live: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/
Free tier: 5 testimonials + social proof. No card required.`
  },
  7: {
    platform: 'Reddit r/smallbusiness',
    title: 'Free social proof tool for small business',
    postUrl: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/smallbusiness/submit',
    copyPaste: `If you have a website, you need social proof. Most tools cost $25-30/month.

I built a free alternative: https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/

Free tier:
• Social proof notifications
• Testimonial collection
• Public testimonial wall
• One-line embed

Paid plan is $9/mo for unlimited testimonials.`
  }
};

const post = posts[dayOfWeek];

return [{
  json: {
    dayNumber,
    dayOfWeek,
    platform: post.platform,
    title: post.title,
    postUrl: post.postUrl,
    copyPaste: post.copyPaste,
    liveUrl: 'https://factspark23-hash.github.io/proofkit/',
    repoUrl: 'https://github.com/factspark23-hash/proofkit'
  }
}];

parameters.subject: =🚀 ProofKit Promo Day {{ $json.dayNumber }}: {{ $json.platform }}
